steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what material Villasana uses in her artworks. The answer must come directly from the passage, not from outside knowledge.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Stone': Stone is never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Chalk': Chalk is never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Paint': Paint is never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Yarn': The passage explicitly states Villasana's method involves 'applying colorful yarn to photographs of people.' ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
